title: Floating Book
result_description: A book rises and gently rotates as it floats up from a pile of books on the couch, composited from a green-screen photo of the book.

inputs.name: background_plate
inputs.what_to_film: Locked-off shot of the scene (e.g. couch with a small pile of books) where the floating book will rise.

inputs.name: greenscreen_book
inputs.what_to_film: A photo of the book laid flat on green construction paper, evenly lit so the green is clean.

capture_requirements.note: fill behind the book with green; avoid harsh shadows/hotspots

params.note: extend to match the background length
pick a mid-tone green, raise intensity slowly until the green clears; boost shadow to recover any keyed-out reflections
crop off the paper edges/borders around the book
soften edges; pull the mask just outside the book
scale the book down toward the size of the books in the pile
first frame: set a position keyframe at the pile; end frame: move it up to its floating spot
add a rotation keyframe (creator used about -130 degrees by the end) so the float feels organic
tint toward the scene's purple + add warmth, slight brightness down so the book integrates
optional: add an adjustment layer to color-grade both layers together
optional: export, re-import, and keyframe a subtle ~110% push-in for a fake camera move

result.description: Book floats up from the pile with a natural rotation, color-matched to the scene.
success_criteria: Clean green key with no edge fringing on the book
Smooth float + rotation (deselect layer to remove jitter)
Book color blends into the scene
